title: Paid but credits or license did not reflect?
description: Your payment may have completed successfully, but your license key or credits may not have reflected in the extension yet.
helperText: Use the *Retrieve License Key* button in the widget to recover the license and credits linked to your payment.

title: Incorrect answer or poor answer quality?
description: The answer may be incomplete, misleading, or not aligned with your course context.
helperText: Upload your notes in the *Notes tab* and try again.

title: Notes or resources upload problem?
description: Your notes or course resources may not have uploaded, synced, or been used during answer generation as expected.
helperText: Retry the upload from the *Notes tab* and note which file or resource failed and what happened.
